train.text: Jobs, jobs, jobs. That's what we need. Jobs for Americans. Jobs first. Jobs.

spans.quote: Jobs, jobs, jobs. That's what we need. Jobs for Americans

train.text: Politicians are all corrupt crooks. Every single one is a lying snake.

spans.quote: Every single one is a lying snake

train.text: Our nation's enemies are laughing at us. We need to show the world American strength. Make America great again.

spans.quote: We need to show the world American strength. Make America great again

train.text: Either we cut spending now or we face national bankruptcy. Those are the only two options.

spans.quote: Either we cut spending now or we face national bankruptcy. Those are the only two options

train.text: Dr. Smith, a renowned epidemiologist from Harvard, stated that the vaccine is completely safe. The FDA has approved it after rigorous testing.

spans.quote: Dr. Smith, a renowned epidemiologist from Harvard, stated that the vaccine is completely safe

train.text: They complain about our policies. But look at what their side did! The other party is far worse.

spans.quote: But look at what their side did! The other party is far worse

train.text: The new campaign launched with the rallying cry: "Take back control!" Supporters chanted it at every rally.

spans.quote: "Take back control!"

train.text: Polls show 90% of Americans support this policy. Join the majority. Don't be left behind.

spans.quote: Polls show 90% of Americans support this policy. Join the majority

train.text: That's just common sense. Any reasonable person would agree. End of discussion.

spans.quote: That's just common sense. Any reasonable person would agree

train.text: The so-called crisis is nothing more than a minor inconvenience. A few isolated incidents, blown out of proportion by the media.

spans.quote: The so-called crisis is nothing more than a minor inconvenience

train.text: So you want to defund the police? That means you want chaos in our streets. Criminals would run free.

spans.quote: So you want to defund the police? That means you want chaos in our streets

train.text: Radical extremists hijacked the peaceful movement. Violent mobs destroyed our cities.

spans.quote: Radical extremists hijacked the peaceful movement. Violent mobs destroyed our cities

train.text: Video games cause violence. It's simple. Every mass shooter played them. Ban them and crime drops.

spans.quote: Video games cause violence. It's simple. Every mass shooter played them

train.text: Francis said these words: "Everyone is guilty for the good he could have done and did not do. If we do not oppose evil, we tacitly feed it." President Trump —who himself avoided national military service in the 1960's— keeps beating the war drums over North Korea.

spans.quote: Francis said these words: "Everyone is guilty for the good he could have done and did not do. If we do not oppose evil, we tacitly feed it."
President Trump —who himself avoided national military service in the 1960's— keeps beating the war drums over North Korea

train.text: Stand with our veterans. Support our flag. America deserves leaders who love this country.

spans.quote: Stand with our veterans. Support our flag. America deserves leaders who love this country

train.text: It was merely a small oversight. Hardly worth mentioning. Certainly not a scandal.

spans.quote: It was merely a small oversight. Hardly worth mentioning

train.text: You are either with us or against us. There is no middle ground in this fight for freedom.

spans.quote: You are either with us or against us. There is no middle ground in this fight for freedom

train.text: Change we can believe in. Change we can believe in. Yes we can. Change we can believe in.

spans.quote: Change we can believe in. Change we can believe in. Yes we can. Change we can believe in

train.text: Choose freedom or tyranny. There are only two paths. Liberty or oppression. No compromise possible.

spans.quote: Choose freedom or tyranny. There are only two paths. Liberty or oppression

train.text: Outrage as Donald Trump suggests injecting disinfectant to kill virus. The President made the comments during a White House briefing. Monsignor Jean-François Lantheaume, who served as first Counsellor of the Nunciature in Washington, confirmed that "Vigano said the truth. That's all." Can the same be said for the Obama Administration?

spans.quote: Outrage as Donald Trump suggests injecting disinfectant to kill virus
Monsignor Jean-François Lantheaume, who served as first Counsellor of the Nunciature in Washington, confirmed that "Vigano said the truth. That's all."
Can the same be said for the Obama Administration?

train.text: The movement adopted "Yes we can!" as its motto. Volunteers repeated it at every event.

spans.quote: "Yes we can!"

train.text: True patriots stand with our troops. Real Americans support our borders. America first, always.

spans.quote: True patriots stand with our troops. Real Americans support our borders

train.text: Fear sweeps the nation as the deadly virus spreads. Panic buying empties stores. Will society survive?

spans.quote: Fear sweeps the nation as the deadly virus spreads

train.text: Real Americans believe in this. Patriots everywhere support it. Join the winning team.

spans.quote: Real Americans believe in this. Patriots everywhere support it

train.text: Climate deniers are dangerous fools. These anti-science fanatics threaten our future.

spans.quote: Climate deniers are dangerous fools. These anti-science fanatics threaten our future

spans.quote: It is what it is

validation.text: The fake news media is the enemy of the people. These partisan hacks cannot be trusted.

validation.text: The coming storm will devastate our communities. Prepare for the worst. Darkness approaches.

validation.text: Protesters marched holding signs reading "No justice, no peace." The phrase echoed through the streets.

spans.quote: "No justice, no peace."

validation.text: The so-called experts might say otherwise. But ordinary people know better. Question everything.

validation.text: According to senior intelligence officials, the threat level has never been higher. Our sources confirm the alarming findings.
